question: What functions can CSPF perform? Choose the best two answers.
options: It calculates intermediate hops to reach a loose hop.
It checks that strict hops are valid.
It re-orders loose hops (only) for an optimal path.
It re-orders strict hops (only) for an optimal path.
It re-orders strict and loose hops for an optimal path.
correct_answers: It calculates intermediate hops to reach a loose hop.
It checks that strict hops are valid.

question: Which of the statements below is incorrect? Choose the one best answer.
options: Link LDP peers do not have to be directly connected.
Link LDP is used to signal transport labels.
T-LDP is used to signal service labels.
T-LDP peers do not have to be directly connected.
All of the above statements are correct.
correct_answers: Link LDP peers do not have to be directly connected.

question: Consider a LDP-over-RSVP tunnel with two hops/three routers within a single area. Which labels remain identical across all hops? Choose the best two answers.
options: RSVP labels
LDP labels
All labels remain identical
Inner-most labels
Outer labels

question: Which of the following protocols can be used to signal service labels for a VPLS service?
options: LDP
RSVP-TE
GRE
OSPF
None of the above protocols can be used to signal service labels for a VPLS service.

question: There are lots of labels flowing around inside an MPLS network. Which part of the router is responsible for each flow? Choose all that apply.
options: Labels are signalled via the management plane.
Labels are signalled via the control plane.
Labels are signalled via the data plane.
Labels are used by the data plane.
Labels are used by the control plane.
correct_answers: Labels are signalled via the control plane.
Labels are used by the data plane.

question: Which statement(s) below is/are correct about LSP-ping? Choose all that apply.
options: LSP-ping follows the tunnel from the target.
LSP-ping follows the tunnel to the target.
LSP-ping follows the IGP path to the target.
LSP-ping follows the IGP path from the target.
Trick question! None of the statements is completely true.
correct_answers: LSP-ping follows the tunnel to the target.
LSP-ping follows the IGP path from the target.
